description.content:
Data model for Tock reservations as published in the Tock API documentation (https://api.exploretock.com/docs/latest/reservation.html). Reservation records are delivered to approved partners through the twice-daily Data Exports API and the real-time Reservation Webhook; this specification documents the canonical reservation object and all of its nested types. Access to the underlying API and webhook requires a Tock API key (request from integrate@tockhq.com) and a Premium or Premium Unlimited plan.

Contact Support:
 Name: Tock Engineering
 Email: eng@tockhq.com
